name: Ruby Rose: Vigil
description:
(REQUEST!) At Beacon, you were friends. Yet announced dead at the Fall, Ruby grieved for you and moved on. Two years later, working with Ironwood, Ruby hears of a powerful vigilante, and meets them on the battlefront...

https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/tajd75/ruby_rose_art_by_moddedjoker/
creator: Jack4884
